creator: jon@xyinn.org
text: I just retested again without having the devlist_blacklist="if_iwm" and also without "if_iwlwifi" in kld_list. It seems to have no effect now (as you said Bjoern). I noticed the 'if_iwlwifi' get autoloaded a bit before the firmware is used either way so that line probably doesn't have much effect in this case.
